response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: Museum(whitneyMuseumOfAmericanArt)
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: (exists x (Museum(x) & In(x, nYC)))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: (Museum(whitneyMuseumOfAmericanArt) & In(whitneyMuseumOfAmericanArt, nYC) & In(metropolitanMuseumOfArt, nYC))
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: (In(whitneyMuseumOfAmericanArt, metropolitanMuseumOfArt) | Museum(nYC))
